holdings.infoBox: EMM is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are Global X India Active ETF stock at 16.31%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 9.47%, Samsung Electronics at 8.03%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 6.54%, and SK hynix at 5.37%.

overview.description: The Global X Emerging Markets ex-China ETF (EMM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund focusing on long-term capital growth through investments in emerging market companies, across all sizes, considered future leaders within their respective markets, while excluding Chinese companies. EMM was launched on Sep 24, 2010 and is issued by Global X.
